name: Epinephrine (Adrenaline)
description: Catecholamine endogenous nwere ọrụ alfa na beta adrenergic. Ọgwụgwọ nke mbụ maka anaphylaxis na njide obi. Na anaphylaxis, a na-ahọrọ apata ụkwụ IM karịa IV (dịkwa nchebe, ọ dị nhata). Egbula oge maka ịnweta IV na anaphylaxis.
dose: Anaphylaxis: 0.3-0.5 mg IM (apata ụkwụ anerolateral) | Injector akpaaka 0.3 mg IM. Tinyegharịa q5-15 min PRN. Njide obi: 1 mg IV / IO q3-5 min n'oge CPR. Bronchospasm siri ike: 0.3 mg IM.
window: Na anaphylaxis: nye IM ozugbo - egbula oge maka ohere IV.
contraindications: Enweghị contraindications zuru oke na ihe mberede na-eyi ndụ egwu
warnings: Ekwesịrị iji epinephrine IV maka anaphylaxis naanị na njide obi ma ọ bụ nnukwu ujo - dị ize ndụ ma ọ bụrụ na enyere onye ọrịa maara nke ọma.
Extravasation na-akpata necrosis anụ ahụ -- hụ na patency IV.
Na-abawanye ọchịchọ oxygen myocardial -- jiri nlezianya mee ihe na ọrịa obi ama ama na mpụga njide.

pediatric.dose: Anaphylaxis: 0.01 mg/kg IM (karịa 0.5 mg). EpiPen Jr (0.15 mg) maka 15-30 n'arọ. Njide obi: 0.01 mg/kg IV/IO q3-5 min.
pediatric.note: Jiri usoro onunu ogwu dabere na ibu. Broselow teepu ka akwadoro.

obstetric.note: Jiri ọgwụ anaphylaxis ọkọlọtọ mee ihe -- nlanarị nke nne bụ ihe kacha mkpa. Epinephrine dị mma n'ime ime maka ihe mberede na-eyi ndụ egwu.
